description: The Gambino family is one of the Five Families of New York and one of the most powerful in the United States. Originating from the Black Hand gang led by Ignazio Lupo and Giuseppe Morello in East Harlem, it evolved under Salvatore D'Aquila and later Al Mineo. The family was formally established as one of the Five Families by Salvatore Maranzano after the Castellammarese War. It remains active in organized crime activities such as gambling and racketeering.
